DLL3._method: log1p(value*6000/1e6)->Glassman(0.7768,3.9723); anchor=max HPA value/million over cell types per lineage; value=single-cell nCPM where available, else blood-immune-lineage nTPM

sources.retrieved_via: get_protein_atlas_gene (protein-annotation MCP server, HPA release 25.1). The tool returns HPA's structured per-gene JSON sections, not URLs; the values below are verbatim fields of those sections. The atlas-tab name is where a human can view each on the gene page.
identity_notes: RNA tissue specificity: Tissue enriched (brain 27.1 nTPM). Protein tissue: Not detected in normal tissue.
RNA single cell type specificity: Cell type enhanced. RNA blood: Immune cell enhanced (trace).
Near-absent in healthy tissue; tumor-associated antigen (SCLC/neuroendocrine, tarlatamab target).

single_cell_expression -> 'RNA single ce._mapping: germ/brain -> Other (max=Oocytes 96.7); Epididymal basal cells -> Epithelial (13.0). No Myeloid/Endothelial/Fibroblast/T/B single-cell entries for DLL3.

blood_expression -> 'RNA blood cell spec._mapping: used for immune lineages lacking a single-cell nCPM entry. B_plasma<-2.6; CD8_T/CD4conv_T/otherT_NK/Treg<-1.4.

tissue_expression -> 'RNA tissue specifi._note: only tissue-enriched normal signal; captured via the 'Other' single-cell value.

cancer_expression -> 'RNA cancer specifi._note: max=GBM 60.2 -> malignant/tumor-cell baseline. HPA/TCGA has NO SCLC (DLL3's principal indication), so 60.2 pTPM is a conservative FLOOR for tumor-cell DLL3; higher SCLC surface DLL3 exists in literature (not HPA, not used).

malignant_tumor_cell_baseline.source: cancer_expression 'RNA cancer specific pTPM' -> Glioblastoma Multiforme (TCGA) 60.2 (max over HPA TCGA set)
malignant_tumor_cell_baseline.kept_out_of_anchor_dict_because: the tumor cells carry the 'Epithelial' lineage label (lab=4, is_tum) shared with NORMAL epithelium in the per-organ files; placing 60.2-pTPM-derived copies on 'Epithelial' would over-express DLL3 in normal gut/lung epithelium, which HPA contradicts (DLL3 protein Not detected in normal tissue). The anchor dict therefore keeps 'Epithelial'=10731.1 (normal, epididymal basal 13.0 nCPM). To give the 135861 is_tum cells the malignant baseline, add a tumor-specific selection in the Path-B applier — a user modeling decision, not baked in here.

conversion.default_floor: 9360.0 copies (Glassman IHC0); lineages with no HPA DLL3 signal fall through to _default
conversion.verified: round-trips exactly against stored TNFRSF9 Myeloid=20253.4 <-> nCPM 89.6
